nasb.text: Then the lookout called, “O Lord, I stand continually by day on the watchtower, And I am stationed every night at my guard post.

esv.text: Then he who saw cried out: “Upon a watchtower I stand, O Lord, continually by day, and at my post I am stationed whole nights.

cnv.text: 後來，守望者喊叫著說： “主啊！我每日不斷站在守望樓上， 每夜立在我守望的崗位中。

ccb.text: 守望的人大喊： “我主啊，我在瞭望塔上日夜观看。

csbs.text: 后来，守望者呼喊： “主啊，我白天一直站在守望楼， 每夜立在我的哨所，
